entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0015 (P00008) awarded to NAVIENT CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF 06/17/2009 TO 06/16/2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ESTABLISH A FIRM FIXED PRICE FOR THE BORROWER DEFENSE PILOT. THE PILOT IS DESIGNED TO MEASURE THE EXTENT TO WHICH BORROWER DEFENSE OUTREACH BY SERVICERS TO FORMER CORINTHIAN BORROWERS WILL INCREASE BORROWER DEFENSE APPLICATIONS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: NAVIENT DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION LOAN SERVICING

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0015 (P00107) awarded to NAVIENT CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::CT::IGF CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF 6/17/2009 TO 6/16/2019.
THIS MODIFICATION INCORPORATES THE FOLLOWING FSA LOCAL CLAUSE FSA 39-6 SECURITY PROTOCOL FOR REPORTING CONTRACT EMPLOYEE DEPARTURE FROM A CONTRACT (SEP 2017) INTO SECTION B OF THE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: NAVIENT DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION LOAN SERVICING

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0015 (P00108) awarded to NAVIENT CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF JUNE 17, 2009 TO JUNE 16, 2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE NOT-FOR-PROFIT (NFP) LOAN CONSOLIDATION ORIGINATION SERVICES INTO CONTRACT NUMBER ED-FSA-09-D-0015. THESE SERVICES CONSIST OF THE CONTRACTOR PROCESSING LOAN CONSOLIDATIONS FOR FSA'S SERVICERS THAT ARE NFPS, AMONG OTHER SERVICES.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::CT::IGF CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF JUNE 17, 2009 TO JUNE 16, 2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO CHANGE THE DUE DATES FOR DELIVERABLE NUMBERS 2, 3, 4 AND 12 OF THE NFP LOAN CONSOLIDATION ORIGINATION SERVICES REQUIREMENT. THE NFP LOAN CONSOLIDATION ORIGINATION SERVICES REQUIREMENT WAS ORIGINALLY INCORPORATED INTO CONTRACT NUMBER ED-FSA-09-D-0015 VIA MODIFICATION P00108.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF JUNE 17, 2009 TO JUNE 16, 2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE FAR CLAUSES 52.212-4 AND 52.212-5 IN ACCORDANCE WITH DEVIATION 2017-02. THIS MODIFICATION ALSO PROVIDES INVOICING GUIDANCE FOR WORK COMPLETED IN ACCORDANCE WITH CHANGE REQUEST (CR) 3571.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF 6/17/2009 TO 6/16/2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REVISE THE INVOICING INSTRUCTIONS UNDER CONTRACT SECTION B.11. ACCORDINGLY, FSA 32-2 INVOICE AND CONTRACT FINANCING REQUESTS SUBMISSION - INVOICE PROCESSING PLATFORM (AUG 2017), PREVIOUSLY ADDED VIA MODIFICATION 0106, IS HEREBY REPLACED BY FSA 32-3 INVOICE AND CONTRACT FINANCING REQUESTS SUBMISSION - INVOICE PROCESSING PLATFORM (DEC 2017).

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF 6/17/2014 TO 6/16/2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO PROVIDE ADDITIONAL PERSONAL IDENTITY VERIFICATION (PIV) TOKENS AS GOVERNMENT FURNISHED PROPERTY (GFP), IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE CONTRACT.

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0015 (P00115) awarded to NAVIENT CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::CT::IGF CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF 6/17/2014 TO 6/16/2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO MODIFY THE PRICING STRUCTURE IN SECTION A OF THE IDIQ CONTRACT, PREVIOUSLY REVISED PER MODIFICATION P00112, TO INCLUDE PRICING FOR CHANGE REQUEST (CR) 4585.
CR 4585: THE PURPOSE OF THIS CHANGE REQUEST IS TO IMPLEMENT CHANGES TO THE BORROWER DEFENSE PROCESS AND BEGIN USE OF A NEW VENDOR TO MANAGE INCOMING CALLS, EMAILS AND APPLICATIONS BEGINNING IN MARCH OF 2018. SERVICERS SHALL CONTINUE TO ACCEPT AND PROCESS FORBEARANCES RECEIVED FROM FSA USING THE EXISTING PROCESS. SERVICERS SHALL ALSO ACCEPT INDIVIDUAL REQUESTS TO APPLY FORBEARANCES TO BORROWERS AWAITING A CLAIM DECISION ON A BORROWER DEFENSE APPLICATION. SERVICERS SHALL PROCESS THE FORBEARANCE REQUESTS FOLLOWING THESE NEW RULES: SERVICERS SHALL APPLY A NON-CAPPING ADMINISTRATIVE FORBEARANCE COVERING/RESOLVING ANY PRIOR DELINQUENCY (TO BRING CURRENT) AND REMAIN ON FORBEARANCE UNTIL FSA INSTRUCTS THE SERVICER TO REMOVE THE FORBEARANCE (ONCE THE CLAIM HAS BEEN DECIDED/RESOLVED). IF THE BORROWER IS CURRENTLY IN DEFERMENT (OR IN $0.00 IDR PLAN) THEY SHALL REMAIN IN THAT DEFERMENT/PLAN BUT IF THAT DEFERMENT/PLAN ENDS PRIOR TO FSA INSTRUCTING THE SERVICER TO REMOVE THE FORBEARANCE, AN ADMINISTRATIVE FORBEARANCE SHOULD BE APPLIED AFTER THE DEFERMENT/PLAN END SO THAT BORROWER REMAINS IN FORBEARANCE UNTIL FSA INSTRUCTS THE SERVICER TO REMOVE THE FORBEARANCE. SERVICERS SHALL ANNOTATE THE BORROWER ACCOUNT THAT THE FORBEARANCE HAS BEEN APPLIED PER FSA DUE TO BORROWER'S REQUEST RELATED TO 'BORROWER DEFENSE TO REPAYMENT'. SERVICERS SHALL UPDATE ANY PROCEDURES, DOCUMENTATION, COMMUNICATIONS, OR CALL SCRIPTS (IF NEEDED) TO REPLACE THE EMAIL ADDRESS AND POSTAL ADDRESS FOR BORROWER DEFENSE QUESTIONS FROM BORROWERS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: NAVIENT DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION LOAN SERVICING
